title: Format a Name
scenario: Write a prompt that takes a first name and a last name and formats them into the format 'Last Name, First Name'. The input names may be in different formats (e.g., 'John Smith', 'john smith', 'SMITH, JOHN'). The output should be the formatted name.
constraints: Must be under 10 lines of code

evaluationCriteria.description: The code should be syntactically correct and valid JavaScript code.
The code should adhere to the constraints provided (JavaScript solution and under 10 lines of code).
The code should correctly format the name into the required format.
